# `dnsight dkim`

DKIM DNS record check.

## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `domains` | text | — | no | One or more domains; omit to use config manifest targets. |
| `--config` | file | — | no | YAML path (overrides global --config for this command). |
| `--selectors` | text | — | no | Comma-separated DKIM selectors to try first. |
| `--min-key-bits` | integer range | — | no | Minimum RSA key size in bits. |
| `--disallowed-algorithms` | text | — | no | Comma-separated weak algorithm tokens (tab suggests common weak values). |
